description: Comprehensive technical documentation per EU AI Act Annex IV / EU MDR Annex II.
Continuous risk management process (EU AI Act Art. 9; EU MDR Annex I 3).
Training/validation/testing data governance (EU AI Act Art. 10).
Description of training data sources, demographics, OMOP concepts.
Description of validation data and external sources.
Reported performance: accuracy, AUROC, calibration, with CIs.
Subset of metrics independently validated by a third party.
Bias / fairness / subgroup performance breakdown.
Caveats, known failure modes, out-of-scope use.
Statement of intended clinical context, indications, contraindications.
Benefit–risk analysis with quantitative bounds.
Plan for monitoring system in deployment (EU MDR Art. 83-86).
Periodic report from post-market data.
Mandatory report of a serious incident to authority.
Information provided to deployers/users (EU AI Act Art. 13).
Description of human-in-the-loop / oversight controls.
Cyber-resilience measures and disclosures.
Predetermined change control / PCCP describing planned modifications.
Version history of model / documentation with semantic versioning.
Documentation of conformity-assessment procedure.
Signed declaration that the system meets applicable requirements.
UDI-DI / GMDN / device nomenclature record.
Reproducible training protocol / hyperparameters / random seeds.
Test protocol / oracle / acceptance criteria (ISO 29119-11).
Trustworthiness analysis (ISO/IEC TR 24028).
Who can read / modify / approve documentation artefacts.
Tamper-evident log of state transitions and approvals.
Role-based access / approval roles (Authenticator / Publisher etc.).
Language(s) in which information is provided.
Formal decision document by an authority.
Inspection / investigation findings report.
Submission via the EU MDR electronic system / EUDAMED.
Single point of contact / liaison details.
Physical device samples provided to authorities.
Notification of substantial / planned modifications.
Field-safety corrective action / national measure.
Disclosure of AI-generated / manipulated content.
Registration in the electronic system (e.g. EUDAMED, Annex VIII).
Provisions on regulatory sandboxes.
Filled-out template / standardised form.
Sampling of devices for QA inspection.
Authorisation / mandate document.
Sandbox exit report / proof of activities.
